annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Ark. Code Ann. § 16-65-114(a), currently 5.75% (as of July 8, 2026). Judgment interest rate = Federal Reserve primary credit rate (discount window primary credit rate) in effect on the date the judgment is entered + 2%. The primary credit rate… Simple interest. The old fixed 10% (or contract rate, whichever greater) was replaced by Act 995 of 2019 (effective 7/24/2019) with the current… Verify the current value at federalreserve.gov; not legal advice.
